category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Mauritius.

title.en: China-to-Mauritius EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入毛里求斯：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入模里西斯：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Mauritius MSB standards and conformity expectations, URA utility regulatory oversight, CEB grid-connection coordination, IEC 61851 safety requirements, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, OCPP and IEC 61000 EMC evidence, coastal cyclone and salt-mist derating, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与毛里求斯MSB标准及合格评定预期、URA公用事业监管、CEB并网协调、IEC 61851安全要求、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、OCPP及IEC 61000 EMC证据、沿海台风及盐雾降额，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與模里西斯MSB標準及合格評定預期、URA公用事業監管、CEB併網協調、IEC 61851安全要求、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、OCPP及IEC 61000 EMC證據、沿海颱風及鹽霧降額，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Mauritius, the practical gaps are MSB conformity and standards review, CEB grid-connection coordination on the 230/400 V 50 Hz network, URA and utility project approvals where the installation affects regulated electricity services, IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23 safety evidence, IEC 62196 Type 2 AC and CCS2 DC interoperability for new public deployments, OCPP and IEC 61000 EMC evidence for networked chargers, and coastal cyclone / salt-mist derating. Mauritius has a mixed installed EV fleet, including used right-hand-drive imports from Japan and the UK, so CHAdeMO and Type 1 legacy vehicles may exist; however, new public charging specifications should be checked against the IEC Type 2 / CCS2 direction. China GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234, and GB/T 27930 evidence is not a direct substitute for Mauritius IEC-aligned acceptance.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入毛里求斯时，实际差距包括MSB合格评定和标准审查、在230/400 V 50 Hz电网上与CEB协调并网、安装影响受监管电力服务时的URA及公用事业项目审批、IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23安全证据、新建公共部署的IEC 62196 Type 2交流和CCS2直流互操作、联网充电桩的OCPP及IEC 61000 EMC证据，以及沿海台风和盐雾环境降额。毛里求斯电动车存量较混合，包括来自日本和英国的右舵二手进口车辆，因此车队中可能存在CHAdeMO和Type 1传统车辆；但新建公共充电规格应按IEC Type 2 / CCS2趋势核实。中国GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930证据不能直接替代毛里求斯IEC对齐验收。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入模里西斯時，實際差距包括MSB合格評定和標準審查、在230/400 V 50 Hz電網上與CEB協調併網、安裝影響受監管電力服務時的URA及公用事業項目審批、IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23安全證據、新建公共部署的IEC 62196 Type 2交流和CCS2直流互操作、聯網充電樁的OCPP及IEC 61000 EMC證據，以及沿海颱風和鹽霧環境降額。模里西斯電動車存量較混合，包括來自日本和英國的右舵二手進口車輛，因此車隊中可能存在CHAdeMO和Type 1傳統車輛；但新建公共充電規格應按IEC Type 2 / CCS2趨勢核實。中國GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930證據不能直接替代模里西斯IEC對齊驗收。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, MSB conformity scope determination, URA approval, CEB grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Mauritius standards, conformity assessment rules, utility connection requirements, IEC standard editions, and project-owner specifications with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、MSB合格评定范围裁定、URA批准、CEB并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行毛里求斯标准、合格评定规则、公用事业接入要求、IEC标准版本及项目业主规格。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、MSB合格評定範圍裁定、URA批准、CEB併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行模里西斯標準、合格評定規則、公用事業接入要求、IEC標準版本及項目業主規格。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
